content.text:
there are some issues in the implementation of this project. all are listed below. fix accordingly Incomplete authorization on config reads — Add role checks to all read methods in ManageConfigUseCase. No unprotected getters.
Admin UI bypasses use-case RBAC — Route AdminUsersScreen user create/list calls through role-validated use cases instead of calling repositories directly.
Ticket getters lack permission checks — Add ownership/role validation to ManageTicketUseCase read methods before returning data.
No route-level role guards — Add per-destination role checks in NavGraph.kt so users can't navigate to screens outside their role.
Rule engine ignores minimum-duration hold — Track condition hold-start timestamps per rule/user and only trigger when hold duration meets minimumDurationMinutes.
Workers not constrained to idle — Add setRequiresDeviceIdle(true) to deferred WorkManager constraints in NutriOpsApplication.kt.
Sensitive fields stored in plaintext — Apply EncryptionManager encrypt/decrypt in repositories when writing/reading compensation amounts, notes, and order fields. Add a migration for existing data.
No image downsampling/LRU implementation — Wire up Coil ImageLoader with 20MB memory cache and downsampling policy, use it in evidence/attachment screens.
Invalid test construction patterns — Replace anonymous class inheritance and null-cast injections in tests with proper interfaces/fakes or MockK doubles. Verify all tests compile and pass.
Rule evaluation worker never scheduled — Register RuleEvaluationWorker in NutriOpsApplication.kt with appropriate cadence and idle constraints.
Config not loaded from env/metadata — Implement actual env-based config loading in AppConfig.kt or update README/docker-compose docs to match current behavior.
Preferred meal times hardcoded in UI — Add meal-time preference picker controls in UserProfileScreen and persist selected values to the profile.
Date validation uses string comparison — Replace lexicographic date comparisons with LocalDate/LocalDateTime parsing in ManageLearningPlanUseCase, LearningPlanRepository, and ConfigRepository.
No evidence upload UI — Add evidence attach/upload action buttons to agent and end-user ticket screens, wiring to existing ManageTicketUseCase evidence logic.
Missing swap authorization — Add user ownership checks in SwapMealUseCase before allowing swap-by-ID operations.
No integration tests for authorization — Add tests that traverse viewmodel/usecase paths per role, verifying cross-role and cross-user access is denied.
No ticket/order transaction tests — Add repository integration tests asserting atomic writes and audit log entries for ticket status changes, SLA timestamps, and compensation workflows.
No rule hysteresis/duration tests — Add repository-backed tests verifying minimum-duration hold, hysteresis behavior, and back-calc rule-version replay.
Hardcoded metrics in rule worker — Replace hardcoded values in RuleEvaluationWorker with actual computed metrics from rule evaluation results.
Let me start by exploring the project structure to understand the codebase before making any changes.

1	# NutriOps - Offline Operations & Meal Planning
2	
3	A fully offline Android application for field teams and consumers providing on-device nutrition planning and service operations without any network dependency.
4	
5	## Quick Start
6	
7	### Docker (Recommended)
8	```bash
9	docker-compose up --build
10	```
11	This builds the project and runs the full test suite. No manual configuration needed.
12	
13	### Local Build
14	```bash
15	# Prerequisites: JDK 17+, Android SDK 34
16	./gradlew assembleDebug
17	```
18	
19	### Run Tests
20	```bash
21	# Via script
22	./run_tests.sh
23	
24	# Or directly
25	./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest
26	```
27	
28	## Architecture
29	
30	### Stack
31	| Component | Technology |
32	|-----------|------------|
33	| UI | Jetpack Compose (Material 3) |
34	| DI | Hilt |
35	| Database | SQLDelight + SQLCipher (encrypted) |
36	| Async | Kotlin Coroutines |
37	| Background | WorkManager |
38	| Min SDK | Android 10 (API 29) |
39	
40	### Layer Structure
41	```
42	app/src/main/java/com/nutriops/app/
43	├── config/          # Centralized configuration (single source of truth)
44	├── logging/         # Structured logging with PII redaction
45	├── security/        # Auth, RBAC, encryption, password hashing
46	├── audit/           # Immutable append-only audit trail
47	├── data/
48	│   ├── local/       # SQLDelight database factory
49	│   └── repository/  # Repository layer with transactional writes
50	├── domain/
51	│   ├── model/       # Enums, status machines, domain types
52	│   └── usecase/     # Business logic use cases
53	├── di/              # Hilt dependency injection modules
54	├── worker/          # WorkManager background workers
55	└── ui/              # Jetpack Compose screens per role
56	    ├── auth/        # Login, first-run bootstrap
57	    ├── admin/       # Administrator dashboard, config, rules
58	    ├── agent/       # Agent ticket management
59	    └── enduser/     # End user plans, meals, messages
60	```
61	
62	## Roles & Flows
63	
64	### Administrator
65	- Manage users (create Agents, End Users)
66	- Operations & Configuration Center (homepage modules, ad slots, campaigns, coupons, black/whitelist, purchase limits)
67	- Config versioning with 10% canary rollout (deterministic assignment)
68	- Metrics & Rules Engine (compound conditions, hysteresis, back-calculation)
69	- View immutable audit trail
70	
71	### Agent
72	- Ticket management (delay/dispute/lost-item)
73	- SLA tracking (4 business hour first response, 3 day resolution)
74	- Evidence review (image/text only)
75	- Compensation workflow (auto-approve <= $10, agent approval > $10)
76	- PII reveal with audit logging
77	
78	### End User
79	- Profile creation (age range, dietary pattern, allergies, goals)
80	- Weekly meal plan generation with explainable recommendations (>= 2 reasons per meal)
81	- One-click meal swaps within tolerance (±10% calories, ±5g protein)
82	- Learning plan lifecycle (NOT_STARTED → IN_PROGRESS → PAUSED → COMPLETED → ARCHIVED)
83	- Duplicate-before-edit for completed plans
84	- In-app messages and reminders (quiet hours 9PM-7AM, max 3/day)
85	- Support ticket creation
86	
87	## Security
88	
89	- **Authentication**: PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 password hashing, lockout after 5 failed attempts (30 min)
90	- **Authorization**: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with object-level ownership checks (BOLA/IDOR protection)
91	- **Encryption**: SQLCipher database encryption at rest, Android Keystore for field-level encryption
92	- **Audit**: Append-only audit trail (no UPDATE/DELETE) with actor ID and timestamp on every critical write
93	- **PII**: Masked by default in UI, agent-only reveal toggle logged to audit
94	- **Logging**: Automatic redaction of passwords, tokens, SSNs, and sensitive fields
95	
96	## Configuration
97	
98	All configuration is centralized in `AppConfig.kt`. Environment variables are defined in `docker-compose.yml`:
99	
100	| Variable | Default | Description |
101	|----------|---------|-------------|
102	| ENABLE_TLS | false | TLS toggle |
103	| DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY | (generated) | Database encryption key |
104	| MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS | 5 | Failed login threshold |
105	| LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES | 30 | Account lockout duration |
106	| SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS | 4 | Business hours for first response |
107	| SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS | 3 | Business days for resolution |
108	| QUIET_HOURS_START | 21:00 | Reminder quiet period start |
109	| QUIET_HOURS_END | 07:00 | Reminder quiet period end |
110	| MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY | 3 | Daily reminder cap |
111	| CANARY_PERCENTAGE | 10 | Canary rollout percentage |
112	| IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB | 20 | Image cache size limit |
113	| COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX | 10 | Auto-approve threshold |
114	
115	## Database
116	
117	SQLDelight schema files in `app/src/main/sqldelight/`:
118	- All tables with constraints, CHECK clauses, and foreign keys
119	- Composite indexes: `(userId, date)` for plans, `(status, updatedAt)` for tickets
120	- AuditEvents table: INSERT only, no UPDATE/DELETE queries
121	
122	## Testing
123	
124	Test suite covers:
125	- **Security**: Password hashing, RBAC permission matrix, authorization checks
126	- **State machines**: Learning plan transitions, ticket status transitions
127	- **Business logic**: Macro calculations, rule engine evaluation, compound conditions
128	- **Logging**: PII redaction, sensitive data filtering
129	- **Configuration**: Default values, overrides, boundary conditions
130	
131	Run with: `./run_tests.sh` or `docker-compose up --build`
132	
133	## Offline Constraints
134	
135	- No INTERNET permission in manifest
136	- No remote API calls, cloud storage, or server-side logic
137	- All data stored locally in encrypted SQLite
138	- WorkManager for background tasks (reminders, SLA checks, rule evaluation)
139	- Android 10+ scoped storage for evidence images
140	- Images downsampled on load with 20 MB LRU cache

3	import android.app.Application

5	import androidx.work.*
6	import com.nutriops.app.config.AppConfig

8	import com.nutriops.app.worker.ReminderWorker
9	import com.nutriops.app.worker.SlaCheckWorker

11	import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
12	import javax.inject.Inject
13	
14	@HiltAndroidApp
15	class NutriOpsApplication : Application(), Configuration.Provider {
16	
17	    @Inject
18	    lateinit var workerFactory: HiltWorkerFactory
19	
20	    override val workManagerConfiguration: Configuration
21	        get() = Configuration.Builder()
22	            .setWorkerFactory(workerFactory)
23	            .setMinimumLoggingLevel(android.util.Log.INFO)
24	            .build()
25	
26	    override fun onCreate() {
27	        super.onCreate()
28	        AppConfig.initialize(this)
29	        AppLogger.info("App", "NutriOps application started")
30	        schedulePeriodicWork()
31	    }
32	
33	    private fun schedulePeriodicWork() {
34	        val workManager = WorkManager.getInstance(this)
35	
36	        // Schedule reminder delivery - runs every 15 minutes when device is idle
37	        val reminderWork = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<ReminderWorker>(15, TimeUnit.MINUTES)
38	            .setConstraints(
39	                Constraints.Builder()
40	                    .setRequiresBatteryNotLow(true)
41	                    .build()
42	            )
43	            .build()
44	
45	        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
46	            ReminderWorker.WORK_NAME,
47	            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
48	            reminderWork
49	        )
50	
51	        // Schedule SLA checks - runs every 30 minutes
52	        val slaWork = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<SlaCheckWorker>(30, TimeUnit.MINUTES)
53	            .setConstraints(
54	                Constraints.Builder()
55	                    .setRequiresBatteryNotLow(true)
56	                    .build()
57	            )
58	            .build()
59	
60	        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
61	            SlaCheckWorker.WORK_NAME,
62	            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
63	            slaWork
64	        )
65	
66	        AppLogger.info("App", "Periodic workers scheduled (reminders: 15min, SLA: 30min)")
67	    }
68	}

| Feature | Location |
|---------|----------|
| **Config Management** | ManageConfigUseCase.kt, AppConfig.kt, ConfigRepository.kt |
| **Admin Users** | AdminUsersScreen.kt, UserRepository.kt |
| **Ticket Management** | ManageTicketUseCase.kt, TicketRepository.kt, AgentScreens.kt |
| **Navigation** | NavGraph.kt (Routes object defines all 19 routes) |
| **Rule Engine** | EvaluateRuleUseCase.kt, RuleRepository.kt, RuleEvaluationWorker.kt |
| **Learning Plans** | ManageLearningPlanUseCase.kt, LearningPlanRepository.kt, UserLearningPlanScreen.kt |
| **Meal Swaps** | SwapMealUseCase.kt, MealPlanRepository.kt, SwapMappings.sq |
| **Evidence Items** | EvidenceItems.sq, AgentScreens.kt (image/text only) |
| **Encryption** | EncryptionManager.kt (field-level), SQLCipher (database-level) |
| **Image Loading** | Coil Compose 2.5.0 (20 MB LRU cache, 1920px max, 85% quality) |
| **Audit Trail** | AuditManager.kt, AuditEvents.sq (append-only, no UPDATE/DELETE) |
| **Background Workers** | ReminderWorker.kt (15min), SlaCheckWorker.kt (30min), RuleEvaluationWorker.kt |
| **User Profiles** | UserProfileScreen.kt, ProfileRepository.kt (age, diet, allergies, goals) |

---

### 5. ARCHITECTURE HIGHLIGHTS

- **Clean Architecture**: Domain (use cases) → Data (repositories) → UI (Compose screens)
- **Dependency Injection**: Hilt with AppModule, DatabaseModule, RepositoryModule
- **State Management**: ViewModel + StateFlow (AuthViewModel shown)
- **Async**: Kotlin Coroutines throughout
- **Database**: SQLDelight + SQLCipher (offline-first, encrypted at rest)
- **Security**: PBKDF2 hashing, RBAC, field-level encryption, append-only audit
- **Background Tasks**: WorkManager with 3 workers (Reminders, SLA, Rules)
- **Offline-First**: No INTERNET permission, all data local

This is a production-grade Android app with enterprise-level security, audit logging, role-based access control, and comprehensive offline functionality.

- `D:\Documents\Dev\Projects\Work\Eaglepoint\w2t150\repo/docker-compose.yml` - Docker Compose with env vars
- `D:\Documents\Dev\Projects\Work\Eaglepoint\w2t150\repo/run_tests.sh` - Test execution script

---

### 4. KEY FEATURES MAPPING

| Feature | Location |
|---------|----------|
| **Config Management** | ManageConfigUseCase.kt, AppConfig.kt, ConfigRepository.kt |
| **Admin Users** | AdminUsersScreen.kt, UserRepository.kt |
| **Ticket Management** | ManageTicketUseCase.kt, TicketRepository.kt, AgentScreens.kt |
| **Navigation** | NavGraph.kt (Routes object defines all 19 routes) |
| **Rule Engine** | EvaluateRuleUseCase.kt, RuleRepository.kt, RuleEvaluationWorker.kt |
| **Learning Plans** | ManageLearningPlanUseCase.kt, LearningPlanRepository.kt, UserLearningPlanScreen.kt |
| **Meal Swaps** | SwapMealUseCase.kt, MealPlanRepository.kt, SwapMappings.sq |
| **Evidence Items** | EvidenceItems.sq, AgentScreens.kt (image/text only) |
| **Encryption** | EncryptionManager.kt (field-level), SQLCipher (database-level) |
| **Image Loading** | Coil Compose 2.5.0 (20 MB LRU cache, 1920px max, 85% quality) |
| **Audit Trail** | AuditManager.kt, AuditEvents.sq (append-only, no UPDATE/DELETE) |
| **Background Workers** | ReminderWorker.kt (15min), SlaCheckWorker.kt (30min), RuleEvaluationWorker.kt |
| **User Profiles** | UserProfileScreen.kt, ProfileRepository.kt (age, diet, allergies, goals) |

---

### 5. ARCHITECTURE HIGHLIGHTS

- **Clean Architecture**: Domain (use cases) → Data (repositories) → UI (Compose screens)
- **Dependency Injection**: Hilt with AppModule, DatabaseModule, RepositoryModule
- **State Management**: ViewModel + StateFlow (AuthViewModel shown)
- **Async**: Kotlin Coroutines throughout
- **Database**: SQLDelight + SQLCipher (offline-first, encrypted at rest)
- **Security**: PBKDF2 hashing, RBAC, field-level encryption, append-only audit
- **Background Tasks**: WorkManager with 3 workers (Reminders, SLA, Rules)
- **Offline-First**: No INTERNET permission, all data local

This is a production-grade Android app with enterprise-level security, audit logging, role-based access control, and comprehensive offline functionality.

4	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.TicketRepository

9	/**
10	 * Complete ticket lifecycle management:
11	 * - Create delay/dispute/lost-item tickets
12	 * - SLA clock management (4 business hour first response, 3 day resolution)
13	 * - Evidence upload (image/text only)
14	 * - Compensation suggestion with auto-approve threshold ($10)
15	 * - Agent approval workflow for amounts above threshold
16	 * - Status transition enforcement
17	 */
18	class ManageTicketUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val ticketRepository: TicketRepository,
20	    private val messageRepository: MessageRepository
21	) {
22	    suspend fun createTicket(
23	        userId: String,
24	        ticketType: TicketType,
25	        priority: TicketPriority,
26	        subject: String,
27	        description: String,
28	        actorId: String,
29	        actorRole: Role
30	    ): Result<String> {
31	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.CREATE_TICKET)
32	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
33	
34	        if (subject.isBlank()) {
35	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Subject is required"))
36	        }
37	
38	        val result = ticketRepository.createTicket(userId, ticketType, priority, subject, description, actorId, actorRole)
39	
40	        // Trigger message on ticket creation
41	        result.onSuccess { ticketId ->
42	            messageRepository.sendMessage(
43	                userId = userId,
44	                templateId = null,
45	                title = "Ticket Created: $subject",
46	                body = "Your ${ticketType.name.lowercase()} ticket has been created. We'll respond within 4 business hours.",
47	                messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
48	                triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.TICKET_CREATED.key
49	            )
50	        }
51	
52	        return result
53	    }
54	
55	    suspend fun assignToAgent(
56	        ticketId: String,
57	        agentId: String,
58	        actorId: String,
59	        actorRole: Role
60	    ): Result<Unit> {
61	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.ASSIGN_TICKET)
62	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
63	
64	        return ticketRepository.assignTicket(ticketId, agentId, actorId, actorRole)
65	    }
66	
67	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
68	        ticketId: String,
69	        newStatus: TicketStatus,
70	        actorId: String,
71	        actorRole: Role
72	    ): Result<Unit> {
73	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
74	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
75	
76	        val result = ticketRepository.transitionTicketStatus(ticketId, newStatus, actorId, actorRole)
77	
78	        // Send notification on status changes
79	        result.onSuccess {
80	            val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId)
81	            if (ticket != null) {
82	                messageRepository.sendMessage(
83	                    userId = ticket.userId,
84	                    templateId = null,
85	                    title = "Ticket Updated",
86	                    body = "Your ticket '${ticket.subject}' status changed to ${newStatus.name}.",
87	                    messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
88	                    triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.TICKET_UPDATED.key
89	                )
90	            }
91	        }
92	
93	        return result
94	    }
95	
96	    suspend fun addEvidence(
97	        ticketId: String,
98	        evidenceType: EvidenceType,
99	        contentUri: String?,
100	        textContent: String?,
101	        uploadedBy: String,
102	        fileSizeBytes: Long?,
103	        actorRole: Role
104	    ): Result<String> {
105	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.UPLOAD_EVIDENCE)
106	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
107	
108	        // Enforce image/text only
109	        if (evidenceType != EvidenceType.IMAGE && evidenceType != EvidenceType.TEXT) {
110	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Only image and text evidence are supported"))
111	        }
112	
113	        return ticketRepository.addEvidence(ticketId, evidenceType, contentUri, textContent, uploadedBy, fileSizeBytes, actorRole)
114	    }
115	
116	    suspend fun suggestCompensation(
117	        ticketId: String,
118	        amount: Double,
119	        actorId: String,
120	        actorRole: Role
121	    ): Result<Unit> {
122	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SUGGEST_COMPENSATION)
123	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
124	
125	        return ticketRepository.suggestCompensation(ticketId, amount, actorId, actorRole)
126	    }
127	
128	    suspend fun approveCompensation(
129	        ticketId: String,
130	        approvedAmount: Double,
131	        actorId: String,
132	        actorRole: Role
133	    ): Result<Unit> {
134	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.APPROVE_COMPENSATION)
135	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
136	
137	        val result = ticketRepository.approveCompensation(ticketId, approvedAmount, actorId, actorRole)
138	
139	        result.onSuccess {
140	            val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId)
141	            if (ticket != null) {
142	                messageRepository.sendMessage(
143	                    userId = ticket.userId,
144	                    templateId = null,
145	                    title = "Compensation Approved",
146	                    body = "A compensation of \$$approvedAmount has been approved for your ticket.",
147	                    messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
148	                    triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.COMPENSATION_APPROVED.key
149	                )
150	            }
151	        }
152	
153	        return result
154	    }
155	
156	    suspend fun pauseSla(ticketId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> {
157	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
158	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
159	        return ticketRepository.pauseSla(ticketId, actorId, actorRole)
160	    }
161	
162	    suspend fun resumeSla(ticketId: String, pauseMinutes: Long, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> {
163	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
164	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
165	        return ticketRepository.resumeSla(ticketId, pauseMinutes, actorId, actorRole)
166	    }

168	    suspend fun getTicketDetails(ticketId: String) = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId)
169	    suspend fun getTicketsByUser(userId: String) = ticketRepository.getTicketsByUserId(userId)
170	    suspend fun getTicketsForAgent(agentId: String) = ticketRepository.getTicketsByAgentId(agentId)
171	    suspend fun getOpenTickets() = ticketRepository.getOpenTickets()
172	    suspend fun getEvidence(ticketId: String) = ticketRepository.getEvidenceByTicketId(ticketId)
173	
174	    fun getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: TicketStatus): Set<TicketStatus> =
175	        currentStatus.allowedTransitions()
176	}

3	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.RuleRepository
4	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
5	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
6	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
7	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
8	import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
9	import org.json.JSONArray
10	import org.json.JSONObject
11	import java.time.LocalDateTime
12	import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
13	import javax.inject.Inject

15	/**
16	 * Rules engine evaluator supporting:
17	 * - Compound conditions: A AND (B OR C)
18	 * - Hysteresis: enter at threshold X%, exit at Y%
19	 * - Minimum duration: condition must hold for N minutes
20	 * - Effective time windows
21	 * - Rule versioning
22	 * - Back-calculation for any historical date range
23	 */
24	class EvaluateRuleUseCase @Inject constructor(
25	    private val ruleRepository: RuleRepository
26	) {
27	    data class EvaluationResult(
28	        val ruleId: String,
29	        val ruleName: String,
30	        val triggered: Boolean,
31	        val reason: String,
32	        val metricValue: Double?,
33	        val threshold: Double?,
34	        val version: Long,
35	        val evaluatedAt: String
36	    )
37	
38	    data class ConditionNode(
39	        val type: String,        // "metric", "and", "or"
40	        val metricType: String?, // for leaf nodes
41	        val operator: String?,   // ">", "<", ">=", "<=", "=="
42	        val threshold: Double?,  // threshold value
43	        val children: List<ConditionNode>? // for compound nodes
44	    )
45	
46	    /**
47	     * Evaluate all active rules against current metrics for a user.
48	     * Runs off the main thread on Dispatchers.Default.
49	     */
50	    suspend fun evaluateAllRules(
51	        userId: String,
52	        metricsMap: Map<String, Double>,
53	        actorId: String,
54	        actorRole: Role
55	    ): Result<List<EvaluationResult>> = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) {
56	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.EVALUATE_RULES)
57	            .getOrElse { return@withContext Result.failure(it) }
58	
59	        try {
60	            val rules = ruleRepository.getAllActiveRules()
61	            val now = LocalDateTime.now()
62	            val results = mutableListOf<EvaluationResult>()
63	
64	            for (rule in rules) {
65	                // Check effective window
66	                if (!isInEffectiveWindow(rule.effectiveWindowStart, rule.effectiveWindowEnd, now)) {
67	                    continue
68	                }
69	
70	                val condition = parseCondition(rule.conditionsJson)
71	                val triggered = evaluateCondition(condition, metricsMap)
72	
73	                // Apply hysteresis
74	                val lastMetric = ruleRepository.getLatestMetric(userId, rule.id)
75	                val wasTriggered = lastMetric != null && lastMetric.metricValue >= rule.hysteresisEnterPercent
76	
77	                val effectiveTriggered = if (wasTriggered) {
78	                    // Already triggered: must fall below exit threshold to un-trigger
79	                    val primaryMetric = getPrimaryMetricValue(condition, metricsMap)
80	                    primaryMetric == null || primaryMetric >= rule.hysteresisExitPercent
81	                } else {
82	                    triggered
83	                }
84	
85	                results.add(
86	                    EvaluationResult(
87	                        ruleId = rule.id,
88	                        ruleName = rule.name,
89	                        triggered = effectiveTriggered,
90	                        reason = if (effectiveTriggered) "Conditions met with hysteresis" else "Conditions not met",
91	                        metricValue = getPrimaryMetricValue(condition, metricsMap),
92	                        threshold = rule.hysteresisEnterPercent,
93	                        version = rule.currentVersion,
94	                        evaluatedAt = now.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
95	                    )
96	                )
97	            }
98	
99	            Result.success(results)
100	        } catch (e: Exception) {
101	            AppLogger.error("RulesEngine", "Rule evaluation failed", e)
102	            Result.failure(e)
103	        }
104	    }
105	
106	    /**
107	     * Back-calculate: replay rule evaluation using historical metrics and
108	     * the rule version that was active at that time.
109	     */
110	    suspend fun backCalculate(
111	        ruleId: String,
112	        userId: String,
113	        startDate: String,
114	        endDate: String,
115	        actorId: String,
116	        actorRole: Role
117	    ): Result<List<EvaluationResult>> = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) {
118	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.BACK_CALCULATE)
119	            .getOrElse { return@withContext Result.failure(it) }
120	
121	        try {
122	            val metrics = ruleRepository.getMetricsByRuleAndDateRange(ruleId, startDate, endDate)
123	            val ruleVersions = ruleRepository.getRuleVersions(ruleId)
124	
125	            val results = mutableListOf<EvaluationResult>()
126	
127	            for (metric in metrics) {
128	                // Find the rule version active at the metric's snapshot date
129	                val applicableVersion = ruleVersions
130	                    .filter { it.createdAt <= metric.snapshotDate }
131	                    .maxByOrNull { it.version }
132	                    ?: continue
133	
134	                val condition = parseCondition(applicableVersion.conditionsJson)
135	                val metricsMap = mapOf(metric.metricType to metric.metricValue)
136	                val triggered = evaluateCondition(condition, metricsMap)
137	
138	                results.add(
139	                    EvaluationResult(
140	                        ruleId = ruleId,
141	                        ruleName = "Historical",
142	                        triggered = triggered,
143	                        reason = "Back-calculated with rule v${applicableVersion.version}",
144	                        metricValue = metric.metricValue,
145	                        threshold = applicableVersion.hysteresisEnterPercent,
146	                        version = applicableVersion.version,
147	                        evaluatedAt = metric.snapshotDate
148	                    )
149	                )
150	            }
151	
152	            Result.success(results)
153	        } catch (e: Exception) {
154	            AppLogger.error("RulesEngine", "Back-calculation failed", e)
155	            Result.failure(e)
156	        }
157	    }
158	
159	    fun parseCondition(json: String): ConditionNode {
160	        return try {
161	            val obj = JSONObject(json)
162	            parseConditionObject(obj)
163	        } catch (e: Exception) {
164	            ConditionNode("metric", "default", ">=", 0.0, null)
165	        }
166	    }
167	
168	    private fun parseConditionObject(obj: JSONObject): ConditionNode {
169	        val type = obj.optString("type", "metric")
170	        return when (type) {
171	            "and", "or" -> {
172	                val children = obj.getJSONArray("children")
173	                val childNodes = (0 until children.length()).map { parseConditionObject(children.getJSONObject(it)) }
174	                ConditionNode(type, null, null, null, childNodes)
175	            }
176	            else -> {
177	                ConditionNode(
178	                    type = "metric",
179	                    metricType = obj.optString("metricType", "default"),
180	                    operator = obj.optString("operator", ">="),
181	                    threshold = obj.optDouble("threshold", 0.0),
182	                    children = null
183	                )
184	            }
185	        }
186	    }
187	
188	    fun evaluateCondition(node: ConditionNode, metrics: Map<String, Double>): Boolean {
189	        return when (node.type) {
190	            "and" -> node.children?.all { evaluateCondition(it, metrics) } ?: false
191	            "or" -> node.children?.any { evaluateCondition(it, metrics) } ?: false
192	            else -> {
193	                val value = metrics[node.metricType] ?: return false
194	                val threshold = node.threshold ?: return false
195	                when (node.operator) {
196	                    ">" -> value > threshold
197	                    "<" -> value < threshold
198	                    ">=" -> value >= threshold
199	                    "<=" -> value <= threshold
200	                    "==" -> value == threshold
201	                    "!=" -> value != threshold
202	                    else -> false
203	                }
204	            }
205	        }
206	    }
207	
208	    private fun isInEffectiveWindow(start: String?, end: String?, now: LocalDateTime): Boolean {
209	        if (start == null || end == null) return true
210	        return try {
211	            val windowStart = LocalDateTime.parse(start)
212	            val windowEnd = LocalDateTime.parse(end)
213	            now in windowStart..windowEnd
214	        } catch (_: Exception) {
215	            true
216	        }
217	    }
218	
219	    private fun getPrimaryMetricValue(condition: ConditionNode, metrics: Map<String, Double>): Double? {
220	        return when (condition.type) {
221	            "metric" -> metrics[condition.metricType]
222	            "and", "or" -> condition.children?.firstOrNull()?.let { getPrimaryMetricValue(it, metrics) }
223	            else -> null
224	        }
225	    }
226	}

1	package com.nutriops.app
2	
3	import android.app.Application
4	import androidx.hilt.work.HiltWorkerFactory
5	import androidx.work.*
6	import com.nutriops.app.config.AppConfig
7	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
8	import com.nutriops.app.worker.ReminderWorker
9	import com.nutriops.app.worker.SlaCheckWorker
10	import dagger.hilt.android.HiltAndroidApp
11	import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
12	import javax.inject.Inject
13	
14	@HiltAndroidApp
15	class NutriOpsApplication : Application(), Configuration.Provider {
16	
17	    @Inject
18	    lateinit var workerFactory: HiltWorkerFactory
19	
20	    override val workManagerConfiguration: Configuration
21	        get() = Configuration.Builder()
22	            .setWorkerFactory(workerFactory)
23	            .setMinimumLoggingLevel(android.util.Log.INFO)
24	            .build()
25	
26	    override fun onCreate() {
27	        super.onCreate()
28	        AppConfig.initialize(this)
29	        AppLogger.info("App", "NutriOps application started")
30	        schedulePeriodicWork()
31	    }
32	
33	    private fun schedulePeriodicWork() {
34	        val workManager = WorkManager.getInstance(this)
35	
36	        // Schedule reminder delivery - runs every 15 minutes when device is idle
37	        val reminderWork = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<ReminderWorker>(15, TimeUnit.MINUTES)
38	            .setConstraints(
39	                Constraints.Builder()
40	                    .setRequiresBatteryNotLow(true)
41	                    .build()
42	            )
43	            .build()
44	
45	        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
46	            ReminderWorker.WORK_NAME,
47	            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
48	            reminderWork
49	        )
50	
51	        // Schedule SLA checks - runs every 30 minutes
52	        val slaWork = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<SlaCheckWorker>(30, TimeUnit.MINUTES)
53	            .setConstraints(
54	                Constraints.Builder()
55	                    .setRequiresBatteryNotLow(true)
56	                    .build()
57	            )
58	            .build()
59	
60	        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
61	            SlaCheckWorker.WORK_NAME,
62	            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
63	            slaWork
64	        )
65	
66	        AppLogger.info("App", "Periodic workers scheduled (reminders: 15min, SLA: 30min)")
67	    }
68	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.security
2	
3	import android.content.Context
4	import android.security.keystore.KeyGenParameterSpec
5	import android.security.keystore.KeyProperties
6	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
7	import java.security.KeyStore
8	import javax.crypto.Cipher
9	import javax.crypto.KeyGenerator
10	import javax.crypto.SecretKey
11	import javax.crypto.spec.GCMParameterSpec
12	
13	/**
14	 * Manages field-level encryption for sensitive data at rest.
15	 * Uses Android Keystore-backed AES-256-GCM for:
16	 * - Password hashes (additional layer)
17	 * - Compensation amounts
18	 * - Ticket notes with PII
19	 * - Any other sensitive fields
20	 */
21	class EncryptionManager(private val context: Context) {
22	
23	    companion object {
24	        private const val KEYSTORE_PROVIDER = "AndroidKeyStore"
25	        private const val KEY_ALIAS = "nutriops_field_encryption_key"
26	        private const val TRANSFORMATION = "AES/GCM/NoPadding"
27	        private const val GCM_TAG_LENGTH = 128
28	        private const val IV_SEPARATOR = ":"
29	    }
30	
31	    private val keyStore: KeyStore = KeyStore.getInstance(KEYSTORE_PROVIDER).apply { load(null) }
32	
33	    init {
34	        if (!keyStore.containsAlias(KEY_ALIAS)) {
35	            generateKey()
36	        }
37	    }
38	
39	    fun encrypt(plaintext: String): String {
40	        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
41	        cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, getKey())
42	        val iv = cipher.iv
43	        val encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plaintext.toByteArray(Charsets.UTF_8))
44	        val ivBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(iv, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
45	        val encBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(encrypted, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
46	        return "$ivBase64$IV_SEPARATOR$encBase64"
47	    }
48	
49	    fun decrypt(ciphertext: String): String {
50	        val parts = ciphertext.split(IV_SEPARATOR)
51	        if (parts.size != 2) {
52	            AppLogger.error("Encryption", "Invalid ciphertext format")
53	            throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid encrypted value format")
54	        }
55	        val iv = android.util.Base64.decode(parts[0], android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
56	        val encrypted = android.util.Base64.decode(parts[1], android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
57	        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
58	        cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, getKey(), GCMParameterSpec(GCM_TAG_LENGTH, iv))
59	        val decrypted = cipher.doFinal(encrypted)
60	        return String(decrypted, Charsets.UTF_8)
61	    }
62	
63	    private fun getKey(): SecretKey {
64	        val entry = keyStore.getEntry(KEY_ALIAS, null) as KeyStore.SecretKeyEntry
65	        return entry.secretKey
66	    }
67	
68	    private fun generateKey() {
69	        val keyGenerator = KeyGenerator.getInstance(KeyProperties.KEY_ALGORITHM_AES, KEYSTORE_PROVIDER)
70	        val spec = KeyGenParameterSpec.Builder(
71	            KEY_ALIAS,
72	            KeyProperties.PURPOSE_ENCRYPT or KeyProperties.PURPOSE_DECRYPT
73	        )
74	            .setBlockModes(KeyProperties.BLOCK_MODE_GCM)
75	            .setEncryptionPaddings(KeyProperties.ENCRYPTION_PADDING_NONE)
76	            .setKeySize(256)
77	            .build()
78	        keyGenerator.init(spec)
79	        keyGenerator.generateKey()
80	        AppLogger.info("Encryption", "Encryption key generated in Android Keystore")
81	    }
82	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.config

3	import android.content.Context

5	
6	/**
7	 * Single source of truth for all application configuration.
8	 * All configuration values are centralized here — application logic must never
9	 * access system properties or environment variables directly.
10	 */
11	object AppConfig {
12	
13	    // Database
14	    const val DB_NAME = "nutriops.db"
15	    val DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY: String
16	        get() = configValues["DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY"] ?: "nutriops-secure-local-key-v1"
17	
18	    // TLS Toggle (per guide requirement)
19	    val ENABLE_TLS: Boolean
20	        get() = configValues["ENABLE_TLS"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: false
21	
22	    // Authentication
23	    val MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Int
24	        get() = configValues["MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 5
25	    val LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES: Long
26	        get() = configValues["LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES"]?.toLongOrNull() ?: 30L
27	
28	    // SLA Configuration
29	    val SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS: Int
30	        get() = configValues["SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 4
31	    val SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS: Int
32	        get() = configValues["SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 3
33	
34	    // Messaging / Quiet Hours
35	    val QUIET_HOURS_START: String
36	        get() = configValues["QUIET_HOURS_START"] ?: "21:00"
37	    val QUIET_HOURS_END: String
38	        get() = configValues["QUIET_HOURS_END"] ?: "07:00"
39	    val MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY: Int
40	        get() = configValues["MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 3
41	
42	    // Canary Rollout
43	    val CANARY_PERCENTAGE: Int
44	        get() = configValues["CANARY_PERCENTAGE"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 10
45	
46	    // Image / Memory
47	    val IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB: Int
48	        get() = configValues["IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 20
49	    const val IMAGE_MAX_DIMENSION_PX = 1920
50	    const val IMAGE_QUALITY = 85
51	
52	    // Compensation
53	    val COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX: Double
54	        get() = configValues["COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX"]?.toDoubleOrNull() ?: 10.0
55	    const val COMPENSATION_MIN = 3.0
56	    const val COMPENSATION_MAX = 20.0
57	
58	    // Meal Swap Tolerances
59	    const val SWAP_CALORIE_TOLERANCE_PERCENT = 10.0
60	    const val SWAP_PROTEIN_TOLERANCE_GRAMS = 5.0
61	
62	    // Learning Plan
63	    const val MAX_FREQUENCY_PER_WEEK = 7
64	
65	    // Rules Engine
66	    const val HYSTERESIS_DEFAULT_ENTER = 80.0
67	    const val HYSTERESIS_DEFAULT_EXIT = 90.0
68	    const val MIN_DURATION_DEFAULT_MINUTES = 10
69	
70	    // Coupon Limits
71	    const val DEFAULT_MAX_COUPONS_PER_USER = 2
72	    const val DEFAULT_COUPON_PERIOD_DAYS = 30
73	
74	    // Logging
75	    val LOG_LEVEL: String
76	        get() = configValues["LOG_LEVEL"] ?: "DEBUG"
77	    val LOG_REDACTION_ENABLED: Boolean
78	        get() = configValues["LOG_REDACTION_ENABLED"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: true
79	
80	    // Audit
81	    val AUDIT_APPEND_ONLY: Boolean
82	        get() = configValues["AUDIT_APPEND_ONLY"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: true
83	
84	    // Business Calendar (weekdays only for SLA)
85	    val SLA_BUSINESS_DAYS: List<Int>
86	        get() = listOf(1, 2, 3, 4, 5) // Monday to Friday
87	
88	    val SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_START: Int get() = 9  // 9 AM
89	    val SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_END: Int get() = 18   // 6 PM
90	
91	    private val configValues = mutableMapOf<String, String>()
92	
93	    fun initialize(context: Context) {
94	        // Load from app metadata or build config
95	        // In Docker/test environments, these come from environment variables
96	        // In production, they come from encrypted SharedPreferences
97	        AppLogger.info("Config", "AppConfig initialized with defaults")
98	    }
99	
100	    fun setForTesting(key: String, value: String) {
101	        configValues[key] = value
102	    }
103	
104	    fun clearTestOverrides() {
105	        configValues.clear()
106	    }
107	}

27	data class ProfileUiState(
28	    val hasProfile: Boolean = false,
29	    val ageRange: AgeRange = AgeRange.AGE_26_35,
30	    val dietaryPattern: DietaryPattern = DietaryPattern.STANDARD,
31	    val goal: HealthGoal = HealthGoal.MAINTAIN,
32	    val allergies: String = "",
33	    val calories: Long = 0,
34	    val protein: Long = 0,
35	    val carbs: Long = 0,
36	    val fat: Long = 0,
37	    val isLoading: Boolean = false,
38	    val message: String? = null
39	)
40	
41	@HiltViewModel
42	class UserProfileViewModel @Inject constructor(
43	    private val profileUseCase: ManageProfileUseCase,
44	    private val profileRepository: ProfileRepository,
45	    private val authManager: AuthManager
46	) : ViewModel() {
47	
48	    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(ProfileUiState())
49	    val uiState: StateFlow<ProfileUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
50	
51	    init { loadProfile() }
52	
53	    fun loadProfile() {
54	        viewModelScope.launch {
55	            val session = authManager.currentSession.value ?: return@launch
56	            val profile = profileRepository.getProfileByUserId(session.userId)
57	            if (profile != null) {
58	                _uiState.value = ProfileUiState(
59	                    hasProfile = true,
60	                    ageRange = try { AgeRange.fromString(profile.ageRange) } catch (_: Exception) { AgeRange.AGE_26_35 },
61	                    dietaryPattern = try { DietaryPattern.valueOf(profile.dietaryPattern) } catch (_: Exception) { DietaryPattern.STANDARD },
62	                    goal = try { HealthGoal.valueOf(profile.goal) } catch (_: Exception) { HealthGoal.MAINTAIN },
63	                    allergies = profile.allergies,
64	                    calories = profile.dailyCalorieBudget,
65	                    protein = profile.proteinTargetGrams,
66	                    carbs = profile.carbTargetGrams,
67	                    fat = profile.fatTargetGrams
68	                )
69	            }
70	        }
71	    }
72	
73	    fun saveProfile(ageRange: AgeRange, dietaryPattern: DietaryPattern, goal: HealthGoal, allergies: List<String>) {
74	        viewModelScope.launch {
75	            val session = authManager.currentSession.value ?: return@launch
76	            _uiState.value = _uiState.value.copy(isLoading = true)
77	            profileUseCase.createProfile(
78	                session.userId, ageRange, dietaryPattern, allergies, goal,
79	                listOf(MealTime.BREAKFAST, MealTime.LUNCH, MealTime.DINNER),
80	                session.userId, session.role
81	            )
82	                .onSuccess { _uiState.value = _uiState.value.copy(message = "Profile saved!", isLoading = false); loadProfile() }
83	                .onFailure { _uiState.value = _uiState.value.copy(message = "Error: ${it.message}", isLoading = false) }
84	        }
85	    }
86	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.learningplan
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.LearningPlanRepository
4	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.LearningPlanStatus
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
6	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
7	import javax.inject.Inject
8	
9	/**
10	 * Learning Plan lifecycle management with:
11	 * - Status transition matrix enforcement
12	 * - Confirmation requirement on status changes
13	 * - Duplicate-before-edit for completed plans
14	 * - Frequency constraint validation (1-7 days/week)
15	 * - Date validation (end >= start)
16	 */
17	class ManageLearningPlanUseCase @Inject constructor(
18	    private val learningPlanRepository: LearningPlanRepository
19	) {
20	    suspend fun createPlan(
21	        userId: String,
22	        title: String,
23	        description: String,
24	        startDate: String,
25	        endDate: String,
26	        frequencyPerWeek: Int,
27	        actorId: String,
28	        actorRole: Role
29	    ): Result<String> {
30	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.CREATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
31	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
32	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
33	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
34	
35	        if (title.isBlank()) {
36	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Title is required"))
37	        }
38	        if (frequencyPerWeek !in 1..7) {
39	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Frequency must be between 1 and 7 days/week"))
40	        }
41	        if (endDate < startDate) {
42	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date"))
43	        }
44	
45	        return learningPlanRepository.createLearningPlan(
46	            userId, title, description, startDate, endDate,
47	            frequencyPerWeek.toLong(), actorId, actorRole
48	        )
49	    }
50	
51	    /**
52	     * Transition with status matrix enforcement.
53	     * Valid transitions:
54	     * NOT_STARTED -> IN_PROGRESS
55	     * IN_PROGRESS -> PAUSED | COMPLETED
56	     * PAUSED -> IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED
57	     * COMPLETED -> ARCHIVED
58	     */
59	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
60	        planId: String,
61	        newStatus: LearningPlanStatus,
62	        actorId: String,
63	        actorRole: Role
64	    ): Result<Unit> {
65	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.TRANSITION_LEARNING_PLAN)
66	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
67	
68	        return learningPlanRepository.transitionStatus(planId, newStatus, actorId, actorRole)
69	    }
70	
71	    /**
72	     * Completed plans cannot be edited; they must be duplicated first.
73	     * Returns the new plan ID.
74	     */
75	    suspend fun duplicateForEditing(
76	        planId: String,
77	        actorId: String,
78	        actorRole: Role
79	    ): Result<String> {
80	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.DUPLICATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
81	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
82	
83	        return learningPlanRepository.duplicatePlan(planId, actorId, actorRole)
84	    }
85	
86	    suspend fun getPlans(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role) =
87	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlansByUserId(userId)
88	
89	    suspend fun getPlanById(planId: String) =
90	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlanById(planId)
91	
92	    /**
93	     * Returns allowed transitions from the current status
94	     */
95	    fun getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: LearningPlanStatus): Set<LearningPlanStatus> =
96	        currentStatus.allowedTransitions()
97	}

9	/**
10	 * One-click meal swap within tolerance bounds:
11	 * - ±10% calories
12	 * - ±5g protein
13	 *
14	 * Only swaps marked as within tolerance are permitted.
15	 * Swap ranking is deterministic (closest match scores highest).
16	 */
17	class SwapMealUseCase @Inject constructor(
18	    private val mealPlanRepository: MealPlanRepository
19	) {
20	    suspend fun getAvailableSwaps(mealId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<List<SwapOption>> {
21	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SWAP_MEAL)
22	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
23	
24	        val swaps = mealPlanRepository.getSwapsForMeal(mealId)
25	        return Result.success(swaps.map { swap ->
26	            SwapOption(
27	                swapId = swap.id,
28	                name = swap.swapMealName,
29	                description = swap.swapDescription,
30	                calories = swap.swapCalories.toInt(),
31	                proteinGrams = swap.swapProteinGrams,
32	                carbGrams = swap.swapCarbGrams,
33	                fatGrams = swap.swapFatGrams,
34	                caloriesDiffPercent = swap.caloriesDiffPercent,
35	                proteinDiffGrams = swap.proteinDiffGrams,
36	                rankScore = swap.rankScore,
37	                reasons = swap.swapReasons
38	            )
39	        })
40	    }
41	
42	    suspend fun executeSwap(
43	        originalMealId: String,
44	        swapMappingId: String,
45	        actorId: String,
46	        actorRole: Role
47	    ): Result<String> {
48	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SWAP_MEAL)
49	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
50	
51	        return mealPlanRepository.performSwap(originalMealId, swapMappingId, actorId, actorRole)
52	    }
53	
54	    data class SwapOption(
55	        val swapId: String,
56	        val name: String,
57	        val description: String,
58	        val calories: Int,
59	        val proteinGrams: Double,
60	        val carbGrams: Double,
61	        val fatGrams: Double,
62	        val caloriesDiffPercent: Double,
63	        val proteinDiffGrams: Double,
64	        val rankScore: Double,
65	        val reasons: String
66	    )
67	}

5	import androidx.work.CoroutineWorker
6	import androidx.work.WorkerParameters
7	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.RuleRepository
8	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
9	import com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.rules.EvaluateRuleUseCase
10	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
11	import dagger.assisted.Assisted
12	import dagger.assisted.AssistedInject
13	
14	/**
15	 * Background worker for periodic rule evaluation.
16	 * Runs off the main thread using coroutines with IO/Default dispatchers.
17	 * Evaluates adherence, exceptions, and operational KPI rules.
18	 */
19	@HiltWorker
20	class RuleEvaluationWorker @AssistedInject constructor(
21	    @Assisted context: Context,
22	    @Assisted params: WorkerParameters,
23	    private val evaluateRuleUseCase: EvaluateRuleUseCase,
24	    private val ruleRepository: RuleRepository
25	) : CoroutineWorker(context, params) {
26	
27	    override suspend fun doWork(): Result {
28	        return try {
29	            val userId = inputData.getString("userId") ?: return Result.failure()
30	            val actorId = inputData.getString("actorId") ?: userId
31	
32	            // Collect current metrics for user (placeholder metrics for evaluation)
33	            val metricsMap = mapOf(
34	                "adherence_rate" to 85.0,
35	                "exception_count" to 2.0,
36	                "completion_rate" to 78.0
37	            )
38	
39	            val results = evaluateRuleUseCase.evaluateAllRules(
40	                userId, metricsMap, actorId, Role.ADMINISTRATOR
41	            )
42	
43	            results.onSuccess { evaluations ->
44	                val triggered = evaluations.count { it.triggered }
45	                AppLogger.info("RuleWorker", "Evaluated ${evaluations.size} rules, $triggered triggered")
46	            }.onFailure { error ->
47	                AppLogger.error("RuleWorker", "Rule evaluation failed", error)
48	            }
49	
50	            Result.success()
51	        } catch (e: Exception) {
52	            AppLogger.error("RuleWorker", "Worker failed", e)
53	            Result.retry()
54	        }
55	    }
56	
57	    companion object {
58	        const val WORK_NAME = "rule_evaluation"
59	    }
60	}

17	@Singleton
18	class LearningPlanRepository @Inject constructor(
19	    private val database: NutriOpsDatabase,
20	    private val auditManager: AuditManager
21	) {
22	    private val queries get() = database.learningPlansQueries
23	
24	    suspend fun createLearningPlan(
25	        userId: String,
26	        title: String,
27	        description: String,
28	        startDate: String,
29	        endDate: String,
30	        frequencyPerWeek: Long,
31	        actorId: String,
32	        actorRole: Role
33	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
34	        try {
35	            if (endDate < startDate) {
36	                return@withContext Result.failure(
37	                    IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date")
38	                )
39	            }
40	            if (frequencyPerWeek < 1 || frequencyPerWeek > 7) {
41	                return@withContext Result.failure(
42	                    IllegalArgumentException("Frequency must be between 1 and 7 days/week")
43	                )
44	            }
45	
46	            val planId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
47	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
48	
49	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
50	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
51	                entityId = planId,
52	                action = AuditAction.CREATE,
53	                actorId = actorId,
54	                actorRole = actorRole,
55	                details = """{"userId":"$userId","title":"$title","frequency":$frequencyPerWeek}"""
56	            ) {
57	                queries.insertLearningPlan(
58	                    id = planId,
59	                    userId = userId,
60	                    title = title,
61	                    description = description,
62	                    startDate = startDate,
63	                    endDate = endDate,
64	                    frequencyPerWeek = frequencyPerWeek,
65	                    status = LearningPlanStatus.NOT_STARTED.name,
66	                    parentPlanId = null,
67	                    createdAt = now,
68	                    updatedAt = now
69	                )
70	            }
71	
72	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Learning plan created: $planId")
73	            Result.success(planId)
74	        } catch (e: Exception) {
75	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to create learning plan", e)
76	            Result.failure(e)
77	        }
78	    }
79	
80	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
81	        planId: String,
82	        newStatus: LearningPlanStatus,
83	        actorId: String,
84	        actorRole: Role
85	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
86	        try {
87	            val plan = queries.getLearningPlanById(planId).executeAsOneOrNull()
88	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
89	
90	            val currentStatus = LearningPlanStatus.valueOf(plan.status)
91	            if (!currentStatus.canTransitionTo(newStatus)) {
92	                return@withContext Result.failure(
93	                    IllegalStateException("Cannot transition from ${currentStatus.name} to ${newStatus.name}")
94	                )
95	            }
96	
97	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
98	
99	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
100	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
101	                entityId = planId,
102	                action = AuditAction.STATUS_CHANGE,
103	                actorId = actorId,
104	                actorRole = actorRole,
105	                previousState = """{"status":"${currentStatus.name}"}""",
106	                newState = """{"status":"${newStatus.name}"}"""
107	            ) {
108	                queries.updateLearningPlanStatus(
109	                    status = newStatus.name,
110	                    updatedAt = now,
111	                    id = planId
112	                )
113	            }
114	
115	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Plan $planId transitioned: ${currentStatus.name} -> ${newStatus.name}")
116	            Result.success(Unit)
117	        } catch (e: Exception) {
118	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to transition learning plan", e)
119	            Result.failure(e)
120	        }
121	    }
122	
123	    /**
124	     * Completed plans cannot be edited; they must be duplicated first.
125	     * Creates a new plan with NOT_STARTED status, referencing the parent plan.
126	     */
127	    suspend fun duplicatePlan(
128	        planId: String,
129	        actorId: String,
130	        actorRole: Role
131	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
132	        try {
133	            val plan = queries.getLearningPlanById(planId).executeAsOneOrNull()
134	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
135	
136	            if (plan.status != LearningPlanStatus.COMPLETED.name) {
137	                return@withContext Result.failure(
138	                    IllegalStateException("Only completed plans can be duplicated for editing")
139	                )
140	            }
141	
142	            val newPlanId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
143	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
144	
145	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
146	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
147	                entityId = newPlanId,
148	                action = AuditAction.DUPLICATE_PLAN,
149	                actorId = actorId,
150	                actorRole = actorRole,
151	                details = """{"parentPlanId":"$planId","originalTitle":"${plan.title}"}"""
152	            ) {
153	                queries.insertLearningPlan(
154	                    id = newPlanId,
155	                    userId = plan.userId,
156	                    title = "${plan.title} (Copy)",
157	                    description = plan.description,
158	                    startDate = plan.startDate,
159	                    endDate = plan.endDate,
160	                    frequencyPerWeek = plan.frequencyPerWeek,
161	                    status = LearningPlanStatus.NOT_STARTED.name,
162	                    parentPlanId = planId,
163	                    createdAt = now,
164	                    updatedAt = now
165	                )
166	            }
167	
168	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Plan duplicated: $planId -> $newPlanId")
169	            Result.success(newPlanId)
170	        } catch (e: Exception) {
171	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to duplicate plan", e)
172	            Result.failure(e)
173	        }
174	    }
175	
176	    suspend fun getLearningPlanById(id: String) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
177	        queries.getLearningPlanById(id).executeAsOneOrNull()
178	    }
179	
180	    suspend fun getLearningPlansByUserId(userId: String) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
181	        queries.getLearningPlansByUserId(userId).executeAsList()
182	    }
183	
184	    suspend fun getLearningPlansByStatus(userId: String, status: LearningPlanStatus) =
185	        withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
186	            queries.getLearningPlansByStatus(userId, status.name).executeAsList()
187	        }
188	}

75	            Result.success(ticketId)

82	    suspend fun assignTicket(
83	        ticketId: String,
84	        agentId: String,
85	        actorId: String,
86	        actorRole: Role
87	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
88	        try {
89	            val ticket = ticketQueries.getTicketById(ticketId).executeAsOneOrNull()
90	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Ticket not found"))
91	
92	            val currentStatus = TicketStatus.valueOf(ticket.status)
93	            if (!currentStatus.canTransitionTo(TicketStatus.ASSIGNED)) {
94	                return@withContext Result.failure(
95	                    IllegalStateException("Cannot assign ticket in status ${currentStatus.name}")
96	                )
97	            }
98	
99	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
100	
101	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
102	                entityType = "Ticket",
103	                entityId = ticketId,
104	                action = AuditAction.ASSIGN,
105	                actorId = actorId,
106	                actorRole = actorRole,
107	                previousState = """{"status":"${ticket.status}","agentId":${ticket.agentId?.let { "\"$it\"" }}}""",
108	                newState = """{"status":"ASSIGNED","agentId":"$agentId"}"""
109	            ) {
110	                ticketQueries.updateTicketAgent(agentId, now, ticketId)
111	            }
112	
113	            Result.success(Unit)
114	        } catch (e: Exception) {
115	            AppLogger.error("TicketRepo", "Failed to assign ticket", e)
116	            Result.failure(e)
117	        }
118	    }
119	
120	    suspend fun transitionTicketStatus(
121	        ticketId: String,
122	        newStatus: TicketStatus,
123	        actorId: String,
124	        actorRole: Role
125	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
126	        try {
127	            val ticket = ticketQueries.getTicketById(ticketId).executeAsOneOrNull()
128	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Ticket not found"))
129	
130	            val currentStatus = TicketStatus.valueOf(ticket.status)
131	            if (!currentStatus.canTransitionTo(newStatus)) {
132	                return@withContext Result.failure(
133	                    IllegalStateException("Cannot transition from ${currentStatus.name} to ${newStatus.name}")
134	                )
135	            }
136	
137	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
138	
139	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
140	                entityType = "Ticket",
141	                entityId = ticketId,
142	                action = AuditAction.STATUS_CHANGE,
143	                actorId = actorId,
144	                actorRole = actorRole,
145	                previousState = """{"status":"${currentStatus.name}"}""",
146	                newState = """{"status":"${newStatus.name}"}"""
147	            ) {
148	                ticketQueries.updateTicketStatus(newStatus.name, now, ticketId)
149	
150	                // Record first response time
151	                if (newStatus == TicketStatus.IN_PROGRESS && ticket.slaFirstResponseAt == null) {
152	                    ticketQueries.updateTicketSlaFirstResponse(now, ticketId)
153	                }
154	
155	                // Record resolution time
156	                if (newStatus == TicketStatus.RESOLVED) {
157	                    ticketQueries.updateTicketResolved(now, ticketId)
158	                }
159	            }
160	
161	            Result.success(Unit)
162	        } catch (e: Exception) {
163	            AppLogger.error("TicketRepo", "Failed to transition ticket", e)
164	            Result.failure(e)
165	        }
166	    }

215	    suspend fun suggestCompensation(

220	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
221	        try {

232	            } else {
233	                CompensationStatus.PENDING_APPROVAL
234	            }
235	
236	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
237	                entityType = "Ticket",
238	                entityId = ticketId,
239	                action = AuditAction.COMPENSATION_SUGGEST,
240	                actorId = actorId,
241	                actorRole = actorRole,
242	                details = """{"amount":$amount,"autoApproved":${compensationStatus == CompensationStatus.APPROVED}}"""
243	            ) {

245	                    compensationSuggestedAmount = amount,
246	                    compensationApprovedAmount = if (compensationStatus == CompensationStatus.APPROVED) amount else null,
247	                    compensationApprovedBy = if (compensationStatus == CompensationStatus.APPROVED) actorId else null,
248	                    compensationStatus = compensationStatus.name,
249	                    updatedAt = now,
250	                    id = ticketId
251	                )
252	            }
253	
254	            Result.success(Unit)
255	        } catch (e: Exception) {
256	            AppLogger.error("TicketRepo", "Failed to suggest compensation", e)
257	            Result.failure(e)
258	        }

341	    suspend fun resumeSla(ticketId: String, pauseDurationMinutes: Long, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> =
342	        withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {

346	                    ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Ticket not found"))
347	                val totalPause = ticket.slaTotalPauseDurationMinutes + pauseDurationMinutes
348	
349	                auditManager.logWithTransaction(

362	    /**
363	     * Calculate deadline adding business hours only (Mon-Fri, 9-18).
364	     */
365	    private fun calculateBusinessHoursDeadline(from: LocalDateTime, hours: Int): LocalDateTime {
366	        var remaining = hours
367	        var current = from
368	        val businessDays = AppConfig.SLA_BUSINESS_DAYS.map { DayOfWeek.of(it) }
369	        val startHour = AppConfig.SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_START
370	        val endHour = AppConfig.SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_END
371	
372	        while (remaining > 0) {
373	            if (current.dayOfWeek in businessDays) {
374	                val availableHour = current.hour
375	                if (availableHour in startHour until endHour) {
376	                    val hoursLeftToday = endHour - availableHour
377	                    if (remaining <= hoursLeftToday) {
378	                        return current.plusHours(remaining.toLong())
379	                    }
380	                    remaining -= hoursLeftToday
381	                    current = current.withHour(endHour).withMinute(0)
382	                }
383	            }
384	            current = current.plusDays(1).withHour(startHour).withMinute(0)
385	        }
386	        return current
387	    }
388	
389	    private fun calculateBusinessDaysDeadline(from: LocalDateTime, days: Int): LocalDateTime {
390	        var remaining = days
391	        var current = from
392	        val businessDays = AppConfig.SLA_BUSINESS_DAYS.map { DayOfWeek.of(it) }
393	
394	        while (remaining > 0) {
395	            current = current.plusDays(1)
396	            if (current.dayOfWeek in businessDays) {
397	                remaining--
398	            }
399	        }
400	        return current.withHour(AppConfig.SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_END).withMinute(0)
401	    }
402	}

25	    suspend fun createMealPlan(
26	        userId: String,

29	        dailyCalorieBudget: Long,
30	        proteinTarget: Long,
31	        carbTarget: Long,
32	        fatTarget: Long,
33	        actorId: String,
34	        actorRole: Role
35	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
36	        try {
37	            if (weekEndDate < weekStartDate) {
38	                return@withContext Result.failure(
39	                    IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date")
40	                )
41	            }
42	
43	            val planId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
44	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
45	
46	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
47	                entityType = "MealPlan",
48	                entityId = planId,
49	                action = AuditAction.CREATE,
50	                actorId = actorId,
51	                actorRole = actorRole,
52	                details = """{"userId":"$userId","weekStart":"$weekStartDate","calories":$dailyCalorieBudget}"""
53	            ) {
54	                planQueries.insertMealPlan(
55	                    id = planId,
56	                    userId = userId,
57	                    weekStartDate = weekStartDate,
58	                    weekEndDate = weekEndDate,
59	                    dailyCalorieBudget = dailyCalorieBudget,
60	                    proteinTargetGrams = proteinTarget,
61	                    carbTargetGrams = carbTarget,
62	                    fatTargetGrams = fatTarget,
63	                    status = "ACTIVE",
64	                    createdAt = now,
65	                    updatedAt = now
66	                )
67	            }
68	
69	            AppLogger.info("MealPlanRepo", "Meal plan created: $planId for user: $userId")
70	            Result.success(planId)

159	    suspend fun performSwap(
160	        originalMealId: String,
161	        swapMappingId: String,
162	        actorId: String,
163	        actorRole: Role
164	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
165	        try {
166	            val originalMeal = mealQueries.getMealById(originalMealId).executeAsOneOrNull()
167	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Original meal not found"))
168	            val swap = swapQueries.getSwapById(swapMappingId).executeAsOneOrNull()
169	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Swap mapping not found"))
170	
171	            if (swap.isWithinTolerance != 1L) {
172	                return@withContext Result.failure(
173	                    IllegalArgumentException("Swap is outside tolerance bounds")
174	                )
175	            }
176	
177	            val newMealId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
178	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
179	
180	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
181	                entityType = "Meal",
182	                entityId = newMealId,
183	                action = AuditAction.SWAP_MEAL,
184	                actorId = actorId,
185	                actorRole = actorRole,
186	                previousState = """{"mealId":"$originalMealId","name":"${originalMeal.name}","calories":${originalMeal.calories}}""",
187	                newState = """{"mealId":"$newMealId","name":"${swap.swapMealName}","calories":${swap.swapCalories}}""",
188	                details = """{"swapMappingId":"$swapMappingId","calorieDiff":"${swap.caloriesDiffPercent}%","proteinDiff":"${swap.proteinDiffGrams}g"}"""
189	            ) {
190	                mealQueries.insertMeal(
191	                    id = newMealId,
192	                    mealPlanId = originalMeal.mealPlanId,
193	                    dayOfWeek = originalMeal.dayOfWeek,
194	                    mealTime = originalMeal.mealTime,
195	                    name = swap.swapMealName,
196	                    description = swap.swapDescription,
197	                    calories = swap.swapCalories,
198	                    proteinGrams = swap.swapProteinGrams,
199	                    carbGrams = swap.swapCarbGrams,
200	                    fatGrams = swap.swapFatGrams,
201	                    reasons = swap.swapReasons,
202	                    isSwapped = 1,
203	                    originalMealId = originalMealId,
204	                    createdAt = now
205	                )
206	
207	                mealQueries.deleteMeal(originalMealId)
208	            }
209	
210	            Result.success(newMealId)
211	        } catch (e: Exception) {
212	            AppLogger.error("MealPlanRepo", "Failed to perform swap", e)
213	            Result.failure(e)
214	        }
215	    }

16	@Singleton
17	class RuleRepository @Inject constructor(
18	    private val database: NutriOpsDatabase,

20	) {

23	
24	    suspend fun createRule(
25	        name: String,
26	        description: String,
27	        ruleType: String,
28	        conditionsJson: String,
29	        hysteresisEnter: Double,
30	        hysteresisExit: Double,
31	        minimumDurationMinutes: Long,
32	        effectiveWindowStart: String?,
33	        effectiveWindowEnd: String?,
34	        actorId: String,
35	        actorRole: Role
36	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
37	        try {
38	            val ruleId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
39	            val versionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
40	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
41	
42	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
43	                entityType = "Rule", entityId = ruleId,
44	                action = AuditAction.CREATE, actorId = actorId, actorRole = actorRole,
45	                details = """{"name":"$name","type":"$ruleType","version":1}"""
46	            ) {
47	                ruleQueries.insertRule(
48	                    ruleId, name, description, ruleType, conditionsJson,
49	                    hysteresisEnter, hysteresisExit, minimumDurationMinutes,
50	                    effectiveWindowStart, effectiveWindowEnd,
51	                    1, 1, actorId, now, now
52	                )
53	                ruleQueries.insertRuleVersion(
54	                    versionId, ruleId, 1, conditionsJson,
55	                    hysteresisEnter, hysteresisExit, minimumDurationMinutes,
56	                    effectiveWindowStart, effectiveWindowEnd, actorId, now
57	                )
58	            }
59	
60	            Result.success(ruleId)
61	        } catch (e: Exception) {
62	            AppLogger.error("RuleRepo", "Failed to create rule", e)
63	            Result.failure(e)
64	        }
65	    }
66	
67	    suspend fun updateRule(
68	        ruleId: String,
69	        name: String,
70	        description: String,
71	        ruleType: String,
72	        conditionsJson: String,
73	        hysteresisEnter: Double,
74	        hysteresisExit: Double,
75	        minimumDurationMinutes: Long,
76	        effectiveWindowStart: String?,
77	        effectiveWindowEnd: String?,
78	        actorId: String,
79	        actorRole: Role
80	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
81	        try {
82	            val rule = ruleQueries.getRuleById(ruleId).executeAsOneOrNull()
83	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Rule not found"))
84	
85	            val newVersion = rule.currentVersion + 1
86	            val versionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
87	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
88	
89	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
90	                entityType = "Rule", entityId = ruleId,
91	                action = AuditAction.UPDATE, actorId = actorId, actorRole = actorRole,
92	                previousState = """{"version":${rule.currentVersion}}""",
93	                newState = """{"version":$newVersion}"""
94	            ) {
95	                ruleQueries.updateRule(
96	                    name, description, ruleType, conditionsJson,
97	                    hysteresisEnter, hysteresisExit, minimumDurationMinutes,
98	                    effectiveWindowStart, effectiveWindowEnd,
99	                    newVersion, 1, now, ruleId
100	                )
101	                ruleQueries.insertRuleVersion(
102	                    versionId, ruleId, newVersion, conditionsJson,
103	                    hysteresisEnter, hysteresisExit, minimumDurationMinutes,
104	                    effectiveWindowStart, effectiveWindowEnd, actorId, now
105	                )
106	            }
107	
108	            Result.success(Unit)
109	        } catch (e: Exception) {
110	            AppLogger.error("RuleRepo", "Failed to update rule", e)
111	            Result.failure(e)
112	        }
113	    }

116	        ruleQueries.getRuleById(id).executeAsOneOrNull()

1	package com.nutriops.app.security
